reference_scope.GSE233801: adult estrus sheep somatic anchors; does not sufficiently define Oocyte, Theca or Epithelial and preserves unknown clusters
reference_scope.iScience_2025_sheep_ovarian_development: developmental sheep reference with Oocyte, Theca and Epithelial programs; stage and sampling dependent
reference_scope.MBE_2024_tibetan_sheep_ovary: 111548-cell whole-ovary atlas with seven broad types including perivascular but without mandatory standalone Theca, Mesenchymal or Smooth muscle; high-weight adult sheep taxonomy evidence
reference_scope.Advanced_Science_2026_sheep_human_reprod: large cross-tissue conservation reference for sheep-human reproductive lineages; not a one-section label quota
reference_scope.Science_2025_human_mouse_ovary_aging: whole-ovary conserved broad boundaries and rare glial evidence; theca, pericyte and epithelial fine states are species-sensitive
reference_scope.AJOG_2025_adult_ovary_expert_review: expected adult ovarian broad classes, sampling limitations, and explicit warning against single-marker or endless-subtype annotation
reference_scope.JASB_2026_cross_species_ovary: nine-species ovarian integration supporting conserved granulosa/stromal boundaries; sheep data reuse GSE233801 and therefore are not an independent sheep discovery cohort
reference_scope.FASEB_2026_sheep_macrophage_granulosa: whole-ovary breed comparison and macrophage-granulosa mechanistic evidence; refines immune/granulosa modules without requiring immune subtypes
reference_scope.targeted_oocyte_cumulus_studies: lineage-state and anti-contamination evidence only; purified or superstimulated cells cannot define a whole-ovary taxonomy
reference_scope.cross_species: supporting evidence for stromal, mesenchymal, smooth-muscle, pericyte, endothelial and rare-lineage boundaries; never a label map
reference_scope.project_matched_single_cell: preferred external reference when species, tissue and stage are matched; preserve source labels, validate a candidate crosswalk and transfer ceiling, and never override contradictory full-feature spatial evidence

matched_single_cell_policy.dotplot_only_role: marker and anti-marker hypothesis plus label crosswalk; no cell-level transfer or calibrated mapping
matched_single_cell_policy.count_object_role: depth-matched held-out calibration and one external-reference channel in multi-channel broad rescue
matched_single_cell_policy.safety: matched reference labels remain hypotheses; strict Oocyte, steroidogenic Theca, Smooth muscle, Pericyte/mural, Neural/Schwann and other rare/context gates cannot be bypassed
matched_single_cell_policy.reporting: show the original label, harmonized candidate, transfer ceiling, calibration tier, current-query evidence and every rejected candidate

granulosa.spatial_expectation: concentric follicular inner wall; cumulus adjacent to oocyte and mural granulosa along follicular/antral wall
granulosa.safety: ZP-family or other oocyte-adjacent RNA without a non-ZP oocyte core does not convert a coherent granulosa program into Oocyte

theca_steroidogenic.spatial_expectation: outer ring around growing follicles, often vascular-associated
theca_steroidogenic.safety: ECM or LHCGR alone cannot define Theca

theca_progenitor_follicular_stroma.safety: without steroidogenic program retain follicular stromal/theca-progenitor or interface

stromal.spatial_expectation: broad ECM background; cortical dense and medullary more vascular
stromal.safety: ECM, stress or ribosomal splits are states unless independent lineage evidence exists

mesenchymal_progenitor_like.spatial_expectation: stable cortical or interstitial fibroblast/progenitor-like domain rather than a vessel-only or follicular steroidogenic ring
mesenchymal_progenitor_like.safety: the 2025 sheep atlas called a very small S100A4-positive population Mesenchymal, whereas ovarian stromal cells are themselves mesenchymal; never add this class merely to match the paper—require a stable S100A4-supported program and morphology that separate it from generic stroma

pericyte_mural.spatial_expectation: adjacent to or wrapping endothelial branches
pericyte_mural.safety: ACTA2/TAGLN or vascular proximity without a pericyte backbone is insufficient

smooth_muscle.spatial_expectation: coherent hilar, structural follicular-wall or nonvascular contractile tracks rather than diffuse ECM background or endothelial-associated mural branches
smooth_muscle.safety: ACTA2/TAGLN-only ECM-rich cells remain contractile stroma. Require a coherent MYH11/CNN1/ACTG2-centered mature program plus additional contractile support. A coherent RGS5/PDGFRB/NOTCH3/MCAM/CSPG4 mural program or clear endothelial-associated vascular-wall topology routes the broad label to Vascular-associated, with optional Pericyte/mural fine identity.

lymphatic_endothelial.safety: PDPN, LYVE1 or CCL21 alone is insufficient

immune.antibody_secreting_alternative_gate: for sparse sheep cellbins, require a coherent cluster with at least two sheep immunoglobulin loci or one immunoglobulin locus plus JCHAIN, together with POU2AF1, TENT5C, MZB1 or another independent B/plasma regulator; low or absent PTPRC does not veto this route
immune.safety: a single JCHAIN, a single immunoglobulin locus, CD74 or MHC alone cannot define an immune lineage; immunoglobulin-heavy clusters still require an independent B/plasma regulator or a stable multi-locus antibody-secreting program

luteal_steroidogenic.spatial_expectation: large coherent luteal structure rather than a thin follicular ring
luteal_steroidogenic.safety: stage is required for confident corpus-luteum or luteal subtype labels; generic steroidogenesis alone remains steroidogenic somatic

neural_schwann.spatial_expectation: thin nerve-like tracks, often accompanying vessels
neural_schwann.safety: PLP1, MPZ or GFRA3 alone is insufficient; require a coherent glial program and track-like morphology

neuroendocrine.spatial_expectation: rare coherent neurosecretory or nerve-associated focus, not a diffuse stromal domain
neuroendocrine.safety: DLG2, RBFOX1 or TENM3 without the secretory-neuroendocrine core cannot define Neuroendocrine; retain the resident lineage and record a neural-like state tag when appropriate

epithelial_mesothelial.broad_recall_rule: a coherent keratin backbone plus one independent surface/adhesion or mesothelial family supports the broad class. When the lineage is embedded at the whole-tissue resolution, keep it as watch and recover only a high-purity subcluster during open-world cohort reclustering. A mixed spatial component is evidence for one bounded targeted question, never permission to expand its complete membership.
epithelial_mesothelial.safety: WT1, MUC16, PRG4, one keratin or internal ECM-rich points remain review. KRT8/KRT18/KRT19 are one family, not three independent votes. Whole-cluster or whole-component epithelial writeback is forbidden unless the exact returned membership passes its own two-family, competitor and observation-level purity review. Surface epithelial versus mesothelial-like requires a stable parent-specific partition and a discriminator program beyond their shared keratin backbone; shared keratins cannot decide the child label.

contamination_rules.oocyte_to_granulosa: zona transcripts may extend into adjacent granulosa/cellbins; require a non-ZP oocyte core and object-level morphology before Oocyte
contamination_rules.stromal_ecm: abundant collagen/MGP/SPARC RNA can enter neighboring bins; ECM alone cannot replace a coherent resident lineage
contamination_rules.secreted_or_mhc: secreted ligands, one JCHAIN, one immunoglobulin locus, CD74 or MHC alone cannot define the producing lineage; a stable multi-locus sheep immunoglobulin program plus an independent B/plasma regulator is an allowed alternative immune backbone
contamination_rules.decision: when resident and contaminating programs coexist, return directly when one lineage is supported; otherwise use one decision-relevant targeted cohort or QC holdout

oocyte.targeted_cohort_policy: all observations passing the multi-module starting gate enter one query-only targeted cohort; do not restrict membership to strict seeds or DBSCAN-supported foci
oocyte.strict_seed_role: high-specificity identity/anti-program and spatial-focus evidence used to identify an enriched recluster cluster; never the final census or the only recluster membership
oocyte.isolated_candidate_policy: retain isolated starting-gate observations in the full targeted cohort; lack of a spatial neighbour is not negative evidence
oocyte.final_return_policy: after adaptive targeted-cohort reclustering, adjudicate clusters using coherent non-ZP identity and maternal/ooplasm enrichment, somatic anti-program separation and cluster/object-ensemble morphology; for every passing cluster return all canonical-cohort members except explicit cell-level hard contradictions/QC exclusions. Strict-seed or spatial-object membership is never a final per-cell filter; return somatic clusters directly with ambient/adjacent-oocyte state tags
oocyte.spatial_location_rule: cortical, subcortical, peripheral or section-edge location is never negative evidence for Oocyte; small or primordial oocytes may occur in the ovarian cortex. Location alone is not positive evidence and cannot relax the multi-module, anti-program, spatial-object or reclustering gates

release_taxonomy.principle: publish the least specific biologically honest label supported by the current full-feature query; this vocabulary is an allowlist with evidence gates, not a quota

context_gated_default.Oocyte: full multi-module targeted-cohort query-only reclustering followed by non-ZP/maternal positive, somatic anti-program and cluster/object-ensemble adjudication; strict seeds support cluster identity, then all canonical members of a passing cluster enter the census unless explicitly hard-excluded

evidence_dependent_standalone_classes.Theca: coherent steroidogenic/androgenic theca program plus follicular outer-ring morphology
evidence_dependent_standalone_classes.Smooth muscle: mature contractile backbone, stable separation and coherent vessel-wall, hilar or structural tracks
evidence_dependent_standalone_classes.Mesenchymal progenitor-like: stable S100A4/progenitor-like program and reproducible morphology distinct from generic ovarian stroma
evidence_dependent_standalone_classes.Luteal steroidogenic: stage support plus coherent luteal program and corpus-luteum-like morphology
evidence_dependent_standalone_classes.Neural/Schwann: coherent glial program plus nerve-track morphology
evidence_dependent_standalone_classes.Neuroendocrine: secretory-neuroendocrine backbone plus neuronal support and coherent rare-focus morphology

vascular_hierarchy.smooth_muscle_policy: Smooth muscle remains a separate evidence-dependent broad class only for a mature MYH11/CNN1/ACTG2-centered program after mural exclusion; RGS5/PDGFRB/NOTCH3/MCAM/CSPG4-supported vascular-wall cells belong to Vascular-associated
vascular_hierarchy.legacy_alias_policy: Vascular/endothelial and standalone Pericyte/mural broad labels must be migrated to Vascular-associated while preserving their supported fine identity

release_taxonomy.report_rule: biological broad classes and retained anatomical/QC/technical/pending states require separate censuses, trees and evidence cohorts; retained states are excluded from biological broad DEG and marker dotplots

resolution_policy.principle: choose the resolution with the best integrated evidence for the current biological question; preserve stable lineages or true subtypes first, avoid state/technical fragmentation second, and use lower complexity only as a tie-breaker
resolution_policy.upstream_banksy_whole_tissue_policy: audit the complete resolution grid stored in the bound BANKSY input, then select for broad recall/purity; this upstream grid is not replaced by the query-reclustering grid
resolution_policy.below_floor_policy: reject before execution; below-floor artifacts cannot enter ranking, stability, biological interpretation or writeback
resolution_policy.subtype_policy: default to a shallow tree; graph clusters do not equal subtypes; merge splits driven by ECM amount, contractility without lineage backbone, stress, cell cycle, LOC/ribosomal/mitochondrial load, low RNA, ambient signal or anatomy alone

adult_sheep_candidate_functional_vocabul.stromal_mesenchymal: prefer state/spatial tags unless a stable lineage-level separation passes

resolution_policy.maximum_default_depth: broad class plus one independently supported functional subtype level; zero subtypes is valid
resolution_policy.merge_default: when adjacent computational clusters differ mainly by expression intensity, ECM load, hypoxia, stress, cycle, spatial neighborhood or low RNA, merge their biological label and preserve the difference only as a state tag

evidence_gates.broad_defined: at least two explicit independent positive marker families, low major anti-program, spatial plausibility when available and adjacent-resolution stability; absolute full-feature detection/prevalence and pseudobulk establish broad presence, while centered module scores and one-vs-rest DEG cannot alone reject an abundant shared parent program; atlas alone cannot pass
evidence_gates.mesenchymal_defined: stable progenitor/fibroblast-like core plus support, low mature-contractile/endothelial/steroidogenic/immune/epithelial/granulosa programs and reproducible morphology; DCN/PDGFRA alone cannot pass
evidence_gates.smooth_muscle_defined: a coherent MYH11/CNN1/ACTG2-centered mature-contractile program plus multiple contractile-support genes, low mural/endothelial/steroidogenic/immune/epithelial/granulosa programs, stable broad-class or targeted-cohort reclustering and coherent nonvascular structural morphology; mural-supported vascular-wall cells route to Vascular-associated
evidence_gates.pericyte_defined: RGS5/PDGFRB/CSPG4/NOTCH3/MCAM backbone plus vascular adjacency and separation from endothelial and generic contractile stroma; release as a fine child of Vascular-associated rather than a separate broad class
evidence_gates.fine_defined: broad locked first; subtype program, morphology and resolution stability require at least two supporting channels without strong contradiction
evidence_gates.broad_only: broad supported but subtype evidence insufficient; fine_anchor_eligible=false
evidence_gates.interface_review: real mixed programs cannot be reliably separated after targeted review; retain rather than force
evidence_gates.context_specific_defined: multi-module program plus lineage-appropriate spatial object/morphology; rarity alone is never a class or a mandatory route

broad_family_evidence_contract.source_layer: project-local full-feature raw counts plus a separately verified project-local normalized validation layer

observation_subset_writeback.principle: a graph subcluster is a computational boundary, not an indivisible biological unit; a mixed subcluster may yield multiple disjoint lineage-supported observation subsets
observation_subset_writeback.remainder_policy: after every supported subset is frozen, rescore the exact remainder against the complete broad catalog; do not inherit the parent or aggregate winner

final_validation.rule: HVG/BANKSY features may select clusters, but final canonical positive/negative marker validation must use a full-feature count/data object; absence from an HVG matrix is not negative expression evidence

annotation_workflow_policy.initial_broad_annotation: use the selected whole-tissue partition to establish supported coarse resident compartments, not to force every final ovarian lineage to appear. A biologically informative mixed cluster returns to its numerically dominant supported parent, usually Stromal/mesenchymal when appropriate, while coherent subthreshold epithelial, vascular, smooth-muscle or other signals remain watch for open-world cohort rescanning. Only low-information or technically irreducible observations enter QC holdout.
annotation_workflow_policy.broad_recluster: submit one broad_class_recluster cohort per initial broad class and run the complete active-contract candidate grid; select the integrated-evidence optimum, permit homogeneous_parent_confirmed, and allow only a formally evidenced underpowered skip
annotation_workflow_policy.subcluster_writeback_policy: every selected-resolution subcluster is rescored against the complete catalog. Parent identity is provenance only. Whole-subcluster return is a high-purity fast path and requires an absolute support floor plus margin, not merely relative winner status. A mixed subcluster may be partitioned into multiple disjoint supported_subset returns when each exact membership independently passes complete-catalog observation evidence, full-feature marker/anti-marker, spatial coherence and cross-resolution review. The exact remainder is rescored independently and may return to Stromal/mesenchymal, Smooth muscle, Vascular-associated, Theca or QC; it never inherits the parent or aggregate winner.
annotation_workflow_policy.fine_candidate_policy: after every broad label is locked, audit every machine-actionable optional child under that parent across the selected and adjacent resolutions. Record supported, refuted or not_evaluable with evidence; zero fine labels is valid only after the complete parent-specific fine catalog was actually tested. State programs remain tags.
annotation_workflow_policy.cross_lineage_policy: a source subcluster with coherent evidence for another broad/fine identity returns directly to that target while preserving source run/cluster/cohort provenance; do not create an intermediate cohort or automatically recluster it again
annotation_workflow_policy.targeted_recluster_policy: create an immutable temporary cohort only when interpretable competing biological programs and sufficient observations make another computation decision-relevant
annotation_workflow_policy.atlas_scope: map the complete analysis set once after terminal residual QC is frozen
annotation_workflow_policy.atlas_acceptance: an unlabeled frozen-QC observation with calibrated moderate-or-higher Atlas tier returns broad-only when non-OOD, ontology-compatible and within Atlas scope; marker/spatial evidence is audit/challenge rather than a duplicate per-cell gate. Defined labels are challenge-only until orthogonal review; low/OOD remains retained
annotation_workflow_policy.large_residual_qc_policy: residual QC at least 10% of analysis observations or 50000 observations automatically reopens initial broad-resolution recall, selected-plus-two-higher catalog scans and embedded-program review; Atlas low confidence cannot close this audit
annotation_workflow_policy.atlas_open_set_policy: coherent OOD groups trigger unknown-lineage review and are never forced to the nearest known class
annotation_workflow_policy.legacy_pool_registries: migration provenance only; the active controller uses broad_class_recluster cohort, targeted_recluster cohort, direct return and terminal residual QC

completion_interface.policy: individual validators are internal checks of one public completion interface; conditional audits run only when their trigger is present and warnings do not become new blocking gates

context_questions: cell, nucleus, spot or cellbin observation unit
primary biological questions and priority lineages
